name: aurora-ui
description: High-end animated React component library for Next.js (copy-paste + CLI).

components.title: Accordion
components.description: Animated disclosure panels for compact FAQ and settings layouts.

components.title: Alert
components.description: Contextual callout banners for info, success, warning, and error states.

components.title: Animated Modal
components.description: A spring-based modal system with backdrop blur and layered motion.

components.title: Animated Tabs
components.description: A sliding pill tabset powered by shared layout animation.

components.title: Aurora Background
components.description: A living gradient field that gives pages atmosphere without heavy markup.

components.title: Avatar
components.description: User avatar with image support and gradient fallback initials.

components.title: Badge
components.description: Compact status chips for labels, release notes, or category tags.

components.title: Beams Background
components.description: Vertical light beams that pulse behind landing page heroes.

components.title: Bento Grid
components.description: A responsive editorial grid for mixing product stories and feature cards.

components.title: Blur Text
components.description: Characters or words animate in from blur with staggered timing.

components.title: Border Beam
components.description: A comet-like beam that traces the perimeter of a rounded surface.

components.title: Breadcrumb
components.description: Hierarchical breadcrumb trail for nested pages and settings.

components.title: Button
components.description: The core button primitive with variants, sizes, and disabled states.

components.title: Card
components.description: Composable card primitive with header, content, and footer sections.

components.title: 3D Card
components.description: A perspective tilt card with configurable motion intensity.

components.title: Card Stack
components.description: An auto-cycling layered stack that keeps the top card in focus.

components.title: Carousel
components.description: Animated slide carousel with arrows, dots, and optional autoplay.

components.title: Checkbox
components.description: Accessible checkbox built on Radix with Aurora focus and checked states.

components.title: Circular Text
components.description: Text arranged in a spinning circle around a center point.

components.title: Collapsible
components.description: Expandable section with smooth height animation.

components.title: Command Menu
components.description: Spotlight-style command palette with search and keyboard shortcuts.

components.title: Context Menu
components.description: Right-click menu with nested items and checkbox options.

components.title: Countdown
components.description: Live countdown timer with animated digit transitions.

components.title: Dock
components.description: A magnifying dock inspired by desktop launchers and app bars.

components.title: Dropdown Menu
components.description: Context menu with items, shortcuts, and keyboard navigation.

components.title: Empty State
components.description: Placeholder for empty lists, search results, or first-run experiences.

components.title: Fade In
components.description: Scroll-triggered fade and blur entrance wrapper for any content.

components.title: File Dropzone
components.description: Drag-and-drop upload zone with file size limits.

components.title: Flip Words
components.description: Inline word swaps that preserve layout while cycling through a set.

components.title: Floating Input
components.description: A text field with an animated label that lifts as content appears.

components.title: Floating Orbs
components.description: Soft blurred gradient orbs that drift behind hero headlines and CTAs.

components.title: Footer
components.description: Site footer with brand, navigation links, and social link.

components.title: Glow Card
components.description: A border glow that tracks the mouse for connected grids and panels.

components.title: Gradient Mesh
components.description: Animated color blobs that blend into a living mesh backdrop.

components.title: Gradient Text
components.description: Animated gradient typography for large headlines and accents.

components.title: Grid Pattern
components.description: Low-contrast grids or dots for grounded surfaces and hero backdrops.

components.title: Hero Waves
components.description: Layered SVG waves anchored to the bottom of hero sections.

components.title: Hover Card
components.description: Rich preview card that appears on hover with smooth enter/exit motion.

components.title: Infinite Moving Cards
components.description: A testimonial rail built on top of the marquee primitive.

components.title: Input
components.description: A styled text input primitive for forms, filters, and search fields.

components.title: Light Rays
components.description: Radiating light beams from a central glow point.

components.title: Magnetic Button
components.description: Cursor-reactive movement that adds a tactile pull to any child button.

components.title: Marquee
components.description: An endlessly looping strip for logos, pills, or small content rows.

components.title: Meteors
components.description: A meteor shower overlay for dramatic cards and promotional blocks.

components.title: Navbar
components.description: Responsive top navigation with mobile drawer and CTA button.

components.title: Number Ticker
components.description: Animated figures for stats, dashboards, and compact metric cards.

components.title: OTP Input
components.description: Segmented one-time-password input with paste support and arrow navigation.

components.title: Pagination
components.description: Numbered page controls with previous/next navigation.

components.title: Particles
components.description: A lightweight particle field for ambient motion and hover depth.

components.title: Password Input
components.description: Password field with show/hide visibility toggle.

components.title: Perspective Grid
components.description: A receding floor grid for tech and SaaS hero sections.

components.title: Popover
components.description: Floating panel anchored to a trigger for compact secondary content.

components.title: Pricing Card
components.description: Marketing pricing tier card with feature list and CTA.

components.title: Progress
components.description: A fluid progress bar with optional multicolor gradient fill.

components.title: Radio Group
components.description: Single-select radio options with accessible keyboard navigation.

components.title: Rainbow Button
components.description: A saturated rainbow border treatment with a soft spectral glow.

components.title: Slider
components.description: Draggable range control with gradient fill and spring thumb.

components.title: Ripple Button
components.description: A soft expanding ripple that responds to the click position.

components.title: Scroll Progress
components.description: A viewport-bound progress indicator that tracks page scroll.

components.title: Select
components.description: Keyboard-friendly select menu with animated open/close transitions.

components.title: Sheet
components.description: Spring-animated slide-over panel for settings, filters, and mobile nav.

components.title: Shimmer Button
components.description: A premium button with a conic shimmer sweep and layered lighting.

components.title: Shiny Text
components.description: A glossy text treatment with a subtle moving highlight.

components.title: Skeleton
components.description: A subtle shimmer placeholder for loading content blocks and avatars.

components.title: Spinner
components.description: Animated loading indicator in three sizes.

components.title: Split Text
components.description: Split and stagger text by characters, words, or lines with 3D rotation.

components.title: Spotlight
components.description: An oversized, animated spotlight that energizes hero sections.

components.title: Spotlight Card
components.description: A card surface that blooms with a radial spotlight under the cursor.

components.title: Star Rating
components.description: Interactive star rating with hover preview and read-only mode.

components.title: Starfield
components.description: Twinkling star field for dark hero backgrounds and launch pages.

components.title: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard metric card with optional trend indicator.

components.title: Stepper
components.description: Multi-step progress indicator for wizards and onboarding flows.

components.title: Switch
components.description: A springy toggle with clear active, inactive, and disabled states.

components.title: Table
components.description: Styled data table with hover rows and compact typography.

components.title: Text Reveal
components.description: Word-by-word reveals that activate as content enters the viewport.

components.title: Text Scramble
components.description: Decrypt-style character scramble animation on load.

components.title: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input with matching Aurora styling and focus states.

components.title: Timeline
components.description: Vertical activity timeline for logs, history, and changelogs.

components.title: Toast
components.description: Animated toast notifications with success, error, and info variants.

components.title: Toggle Group
components.description: Segmented control for switching between a small set of views or filters.

components.title: Tooltip
components.description: Directional tooltips for adding quick context around interactions.

components.title: Typewriter
components.description: Typing and deleting copy for hero lines, taglines, and product loops.

components.title: WebGL Globe
components.description: Interactive dotted globe rendered with react-three-fiber — spin, glow, and depth for platform heroes.

components.title: WebGL Particle Field
components.description: Depth-filled particle cloud with cursor parallax — a lightweight WebGL hero backdrop.
